# The Universe by Venus — Premium 4 BHK Residences in Nehrunagar

> The Universe by Venus is a 7-acre, 10-block premium residential development in Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad. The approved brochure presents 4 BHK unit plans across Blocks A–J.

## Verified project facts

- Official project name: The Universe by Venus
- Developer: Venus
- Location: Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015, India
- Brochure-confirmed configuration: Premium 4 BHK residences
- Residential blocks: A–J (10 blocks)
- Brochure-listed RERA carpet areas: approximately 1,546 to 2,459 sq ft, depending on block and plan
- Larger-format, jodi, duplex or penthouse configurations: subject to current official availability and approved plans
- Status: Under construction; pre-booking open
- RERA: MAA17082/080726/311232
- Architect: Hafeez Contractor, Mumbai
- Principal landscape designer: SWA Group, USA
- Interior design: Hirsch Bedner Associates (HBA)
- Lighting design: LET Design, Dubai
- Interior design advisor: Studio Nilesh Kava
- Landscape: MPLA, Mumbai
- Structure: Ducon Consultants
- MEPF: MEP Consulting Engineers, Mumbai
- Wayfinding: Bentel Associates, Mumbai
- Legal: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas
- Vertical transportation: Lerch Bates, Mumbai
- Sustainability: Savvy Greens

## Block and carpet-area guide

- Blocks A & B: approximately 1,546–1,547 sq ft RERA carpet
- Blocks C & D: approximately 1,755–2,082 sq ft RERA carpet
- Blocks E & F: approximately 2,234–2,459 sq ft RERA carpet
- Blocks G, H, I & J: approximately 1,773–2,083 sq ft RERA carpet

Balcony and wash areas are documented separately in the brochure. Buyers should confirm the current approved plan, inventory, price and exact area with the sales team before booking.

## Amenities

The brochure documents ground-floor, podium, covered and upper-level amenities including landscaped gardens, swimming pool, wellness and training spaces, pickleball, box cricket, basketball, badminton, walking and jogging areas, garden theatre, podcast pod, learning room, guest rooms, Gen-Z lounge, toddler's den and indoor games.

- [The Universe by Venus — Home](https://venusuniverse.in/)

- [Premium 4 BHK in Nehrunagar](https://venusuniverse.in/4bhk-nehrunagar-ahmedabad)
- [Project insights](https://venusuniverse.in/insights)
- [Book your unit](https://venusuniverse.in/eoi)

- Phone: +91 99049 69298
- Sales gallery: The Universe by Venus Sales Gallery, Nehrunagar, Ahmedabad
